title: clarifications
description: The analyst's clarifying questions for ONE round. An empty list is valid and means nothing material remains to ask. In a live operator-attached agent run, the analyst may instead ask the operator through mcp__operator__ask and return answered_log.

id.description: Stable id for this question (e.g. q1).

question.description: The question, phrased for a non-technical stakeholder.

why.description: Why this matters for the PRD.

answered_log.description: Optional Q&A transcript captured by mcp__operator__ask in a live operator-attached run. Leave empty when the operator-ask tool is unavailable or unanswered.
